channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us

item.title: Trump calls for Marine Le Pen to be freed
item.description: President Donald Trump on Thursday defended embattled French far-right leader Marine Le Pen, arguing the “witch hunt” against her is yet another instance of critics in Europe using “lawfare” to quash free speech and censor political opposition.
item.dc:creator: Filip Timotija, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: China to impose a 34% tariff on imports of all US products
item.description: BEIJING (AP) — China announced Friday that it will impose a 34% tariff on imports of all U.S. products beginning April 10, part of a flurry of retaliatory measures following U.S. President Donald Trump’s “Liberation Day” slate of double-digit tariffs. The new tariff matches the rate of the U.S.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Storms kill 7 in the South and Midwest as forecasters warn of catastrophic rains, floods this week
item.description: LAKE CITY, Ark. (AP) — Standing alongside the twisted steel tractors on his family farm in northeast Arkansas on Thursday, Danny Qualls looked on while friends and relatives helped him begin cleaning up.
item.dc:creator: ADRIAN SAINZ, GEORGE WALKER IV and JOHN SEEWER, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Trump backs Luna push for House parental proxy voting
item.description: Speaker Mike Johnson (R-La.) has been scrambling to break an impasse over the push for proxy voting, after Luna joined with more than 200 Democrats and nine Republicans to use a procedure known as a discharge petition to circumvent leadership and force a vote on the matter.
item.dc:creator: Emily Brooks, KRON4

item.title: White House nears deadline to avoid TikTok ban, potential deal in the works
item.description: The Trump administration is racing against the clock to secure a deal that would keep TikTok operational in the United States ahead of Saturday’s deadline.
item.dc:creator: Raquel Martin, WGN 9

item.title: Florida Senate takes up 'chemtrails' bill with DeSantis' support
item.description: The House version of the bill does not forbid the practice of weather modification outright, just without a license.
item.dc:creator: Rachel Tucker, NewsNation

item.title: Colorado Jewish community center still repairing building after vandalism
item.description: "We left Russia, former Soviet Union, in the '90s in order to get away from this type of antisemitism," said Yehuda Aminov of Ohr Avner Community Center.
item.dc:creator: Kasia Kerridge, NewsNation

item.title: White House defends not including Russia, North Korea on tariffs
item.description: The official said that President Trump has “recently threatened to impose strong sanctions on Russia” to further explain leaving out Moscow.
item.dc:creator: Alex Gangitano, NewsNation

item.title: Police say the 2023 Nashville school shooter hid mental health issues from doctors and family
item.description: NASHVILLE, Tenn. (AP) — The shooter behind the 2023 Nashville elementary school attack that killed six people, including three children, had been obsessively planning it for years while hiding mental health issues from family and doctors, a police report released Wednesday reveals.
item.dc:creator: JONATHAN MATTISE, KIMBERLEE KRUESI and TRAVIS LOLLER, Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Trump announces sweeping 'reciprocal' tariffs
item.description: President Donald Trump announced plans for sweeping tariffs Wednesday, saying “our country has been looted, pillaged, raped, plundered” by other nations.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Charges dismissed against Illinois man accused of assault by Rep. Nancy Mace
item.description: Federal prosecutors moved to dismiss charges Tuesday against a man U.S. Rep. Nancy Mace (R-S.C.) accused of assaulting her during an event at the Capitol last year.
item.dc:creator: Sophie Brams, KRON4

item.title: HHS fires entire staff of program that helps low-income people afford heat and air conditioning
item.description: The HHS fired the entire staff of a program that helps low-income people afford heat and air conditioning.
item.dc:creator: Rachel Frazin, Fox 5

item.title: Potential Trump tariff plan could cost households thousands: new analysis
item.description: A new analysis from The Budget Lab at Yale shows how much a broad tariff plan could cost U.S. households.
item.dc:creator: Aris Folley, Fox 5

item.title: New documents describe physical condition of man allegedly held captive for decades in Connecticut
item.description: An investigator said the man's skin appeared "to be graying," and that his physical condition resembled someone "at the end of their life.
item.dc:creator: Jenn Brink, Fox 5

item.title: Final report details investigation into deadly 2023 Covenant School shooting
item.description: The report touches on the shooter's planning as well as the details unveiled during the investigation.
item.dc:creator: Brittney Baird, WGN 9

item.title: Beloved Anchorage pet reindeer euthanized after someone tampered with pen, possibly poisoned him
item.description: ANCHORAGE, Alaska (AP) — An iconic pet reindeer beloved by many in Alaska's largest city has been euthanized, just weeks after someone tampered with his cage and possibly poisoned him, his caretaker said Wednesday.
item.dc:creator: MARK THIESSEN, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Trump is set to announce new tariffs as he takes a political and financial gamble
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — After weeks of White House hype and public anxiety, President Donald Trump is set on Wednesday to announce a barrage of what he calls reciprocal tariffs on friend and foe alike. The new tariffs, coming on what Trump has named “Liberation Day,” are a bid to boost U.S.
item.dc:creator: JOSH BOAK, Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: New documents describe physical condition of man allegedly held captive for decades
item.description: An investigator said the man's skin appeared "to be graying," and that his "physical condition resembles one who would be at a point at the end of their life.
item.dc:creator: Jenn Brink, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Wild weather expected Wednesday gets a rare 'high-risk' designation
item.description: ATLANTA (AP) — U.S. government forecasters are using a relatively rare “high-risk” designation — the highest category they use — to warn that a major tornado outbreak appears likely Wednesday in an area that's home to about 2.5 million people.
item.dc:creator: JEFF MARTIN, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Plastic bag found in dead bottlenose dolphin's stomach
item.description: Tuesday, Mar. 25, 2025, a large, dead bottlenose dolphin was reported on the banks of Deep Creek in the Rachel Carson Estuarine Reserve in Beaufort.
item.dc:creator: Lauren Beachy, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Nintendo Switch 2 launches in June with new 'Mario Kart World' game
item.description: Nintendo has announced a June 5 launch date for its latest gaming console, the Switch 2, which will introduce interactive chat and screenshare functions to connect gamers.
item.dc:creator: RYAN KRYSKA Associated Press, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Chocolate bars recalled over possible small stones
item.description: Dutch chocolate maker Tony's Chocoloney has issued a nationwide recall of two of its chocolate products, which may contain small stones.
item.dc:creator: Joshua Hallenbeck, WGN 9

item.title: Why Tesla may avoid the blow of Trump's auto tariffs
item.description: Elon Musk’s focus on American-made products at Tesla could shield his company from the brunt of President Donald Trump’s new tariffs on foreign vehicles and automobile parts.
item.dc:creator: Miranda Nazzaro, Fox 5

item.title: Democrats' win in Wisconsin court race a big loss for Elon Musk
item.description: Musk and his affiliated groups sunk at least $21 million into the normally low-profile race and paid three individual voters $1 million each for signing a petition in an effort to goose turnout in the pivotal battleground state contest.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Volcano erupts in southwestern Iceland after a nearby town, spa evacuated
item.description: A volcano in southwestern Iceland that has erupted repeatedly for more than a year again belched lava and smoke into the air on Tuesday, just hours after authorities evacuated the few remaining residents of a nearby fishing village.
item.dc:creator: MARCO Di MARCO Associated Press, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Democratic-backed Susan Crawford wins Wisconsin Supreme Court seat, cementing liberal majority
item.description: MADISON, Wis. (AP) — The Democratic-backed candidate for Wisconsin Supreme Court defeated a challenger endorsed by President Donald Trump and billionaire Elon Musk on Tuesday, touting her victory as a win against powerful interests and cementing a liberal majority for at least three more years.
item.dc:creator: SCOTT BAUER, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: US judge orders Trump administration to restore legal aid to unaccompanied migrant children
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (AP) — A federal judge in California on Tuesday ordered the Trump administration to temporarily restore legal aid to tens of thousands of migrant children who are in the United States without a parent or guardian.
item.dc:creator: JANIE HAR, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: U.S. soldier from Joliet dies during training exercise in Lithuania
item.description: One of the four U.S. soldiers who died in a training exercise in Lithuania last week was from Joliet.
item.dc:creator: Jenna Barnes, WGN 9

item.title: California lawmakers reject bills to ban trans athletes' participation in girls sports
item.description: SACRAMENTO, Calif. (AP) — California lawmakers won't change state policies allowing transgender kids and teens to play on sports teams consistent with their gender identities amid heated nationwide debates over the participation of trans youth in athletics.
item.dc:creator: SOPHIE AUSTIN, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Attorney General instructs prosecutors to seek death penalty for Luigi Mangione
item.description: Attorney General Pam Bondi instructed prosecutors to seek the death penalty for Luigi Mangione, the man accused of killing UnitedHealthCare's CEO.
item.dc:creator: Zach Schonfeld, Fox 5

item.title: DOGE staffer who resigned over past social media posts reinstated with higher access: Filing
item.description: A DOGE staffer who resigned over racist posts that resurfaced on social media last month was reinstated.
item.dc:creator: Ashleigh Fields, Fox 5

item.title: Fire kills New York cat sanctuary founder and dozens of animals he rescued
item.description: A fire burned down a Long Island cat shelter, killing its founder, who lived there, and at least 59 of the felines he rescued, authorities said. The fire at the Happy Cat Sanctuary in the hamlet of Medford was reported shortly after 7 a.m. Monday. The cause is under investigation.
item.dc:creator: JULIE WALKER, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Watch: Potential albino pygmy killer whale spotted off Hawaii
item.description: Whale watchers around Hawaii are crossing their fingers for another glimpse of what could be an albino whale.
item.dc:creator: Alina Lee, Fox 5

item.title: Miami's Haitian community gathers in prayer as crises escalate in homeland and US
item.description: MIAMI (AP) — Packed pews, rollicking singing and emotional devotions have marked Lent worship services at Notre Dame d'Haiti, the Catholic church at the heart of the largest Haitian diaspora in the United States.
item.dc:creator: GIOVANNA DELL'ORTO, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Nonprofit groups and Democrats sue Trump administration over election executive order
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — President Donald Trump's executive order seeking to overhaul the nation's elections faced its first legal challenges Monday as the Democratic National Committee and a pair of nonprofits filed two separate lawsuits calling it unconstitutional.
item.dc:creator: ALI SWENSON, Associated Press, ABC 4
